notes: This directory is the authoritative staged golden ISA definition for v0.4.
v0.4 is the live canonical LinxISA profile for this repository.
v0.4 preserves the v0.2 encoding baseline while promoting the unified shader-kernel and rendering-profile contracts.
Canonical v0.4 artifacts keep typed BSTART forms, V.* families, and reserve contradictory legacy fragments instead of deferring them.
